Package de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml

Class JmlTermFactory

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml.JmlTermFactory
public final class JmlTermFactory extends Object
Old legacy factory methods for constructing KeY terms for JML constructs.

    • upperBound

      public Term upperBound(Term a, LogicVariable lv)
      Extracts upper bound from a if it matches the pattern.
      Parameters:
      a - guard to be disected
      lv - variable bound by quantifier
      Returns:
      upper bound term (or null)

      public SLExpression values(KeYJavaType t)

    • createInv

      @Nonnull public SLExpression createInv(Term selfVar, KeYJavaType targetType)
      Need to handle this one differently from INV_FOR since here static invariants may occur too. For a static invariant, take the passed type as receiver.

    • createInvFree

      @Nonnull public SLExpression createInvFree(Term selfVar, KeYJavaType targetType)
      Need to handle this one differently from INV_FREE_FOR since here static invariants may occur too. For a static invariant, take the passed type as receiver.
